name: Russian Baklaczan
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap eggplant in foil and bake for about 1 hour at 350°F.
2. In a large skillet, brown onion in olive oil until softened.
3. Add green pepper, mushrooms, and carrots to the onions; cook until vegetables are tender.
4. When cool, peel and dice the eggplant into approximately 1/2-inch pieces and add them to the skillet with the vegetables.
5. Stir in tomato paste and the remaining ingredients (brown sugar, vinegar, salt, pepper, garlic salt) with about 2 cups of water.
6. Simmer for 1 hour until the flavors are well combined.
7. Add black olives if desired. Serve warm or cold.
